violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with an active Rhode Island Certified Food Safety Manager license. Establishment has an individual with current food safety certificate. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment to register. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

Bucket and chemical were observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The condensate from the AC unit is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other approved method. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and dishwashing room was blocked by a plate and pans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Raw animal foods (such as) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in freezer. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
